rationale: Both evaluations assigned the identical score of 3/10 and reach the same conclusion for the same reasons: roughly 6 months of C/C++ falls far short of the 8-year requirement, no large-scale cloud compute platform experience, and no formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. The wording differs (e.g., 'broad polyglot' vs 'strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded'), but no concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the changed career-gap dates or the Berlin location. The variation is ordinary rewording within run-to-run noise.
